creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
From the linked commit: 

> .It Lk "https://pkg.freebsd.org" "FreeBSD pkg mirror"

Represented at <https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=pkg&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-ports#SEE_ALSO>: 

> FreeBSD pkg mirror: https://pkg.freebsd.org

Represented at <https://man-dev.freebsd.org/FreeBSD-ports-13.1-RELEASE-quarterly/pkg.8#SEE_ALSO>: 

> FreeBSD pkg mirror

It's no longer visibly obvious that a Lk is a link.
